offer: For insurance brokers processing 10-20 policy renewals/month, missed renewals cause coverage gaps. We monitor renewals instead of manual tracking.
problem: Missed policy renewals can lead to coverage gaps for clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about renewals
DM outreach with demo videos to targeted brokers

try_it: Let users try exception flagging for renewals on 1-3 items

Produce a demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities

Set default reminder schedules for renewals
